title: austrolycopodium assurgens
intro: Austrolycopodium assurgens, also known as the Australian king fern, is a rare and endangered plant species native to Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Austrolycopodium assurgens typically involve drying and processing the plant material into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
